Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-44889 affecting package python-webob for versions less than 1.8.10-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-44889 affecting package python-webob for versions less than 1.8.10-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package python-webob is earlier than 1.8.10-1, affected by CVE-2026-44889
